name: fresh-gate
notes: The Telegram veto gate, with the founder asleep. Both fixtures get a three-question fresh slice at T-58. F1: nobody touches it — at the deadline every still-pending question flips to approved and goes live automatically. Zero founder involvement, which is the whole point of veto-with-timeout. F2: question 2 is vetoed at T-40 — the released pack must contain exactly the other two fresh questions and eight base ones, and the vetoed question must appear nowhere in it.
